title: NYC's Bizarre Law: No Dancing After 2 AM!
title_full: NYC's Bizarre Law: No Dancing After 2 AM! #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #weirdlaws
description:
Can you party?

Did you know NYC has a bizarre law that technically makes dancing illegal after 2 AM? Find out the surprising history and why you can probably still party! Follow for more! #Shorts
